<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [DreamHost](https://www.dreamhost.com) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/dreamhost/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "dreamhost"
  dnsCredentials:
    # DREAMHOST_API_KEY: The API key
    apiKey: ""
    # DREAMHOST_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: 30)
    httpTimeout: ""
    # DREAMHOST_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 60)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # DREAMHOST_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 3600)
    propagationTimeout: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
